title: How to 10x Your Claude Code Projects (Karpathy's Method)
summary: Austin Marchese breaks down three strategies attributed to Andrej Karpathy for increasing productivity with Claude Code: LLM Knowledge Bases, Auto-Research, and Context Engineering. The video positions these as replicable principles for 10x output improvement in code projects.
